templates.name: GitHub
templates.description: Manage repositories, issues, pull requests, and code search
templates.auth_instructions: Go to GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Generate new token

templates.name: GitLab
templates.description: Manage projects, merge requests, and CI/CD pipelines
templates.auth_instructions: Go to GitLab → Preferences → Access Tokens → Create personal access token

templates.name: Linear
templates.description: Project management — issues, projects, and cycles
templates.auth_instructions: Go to Linear → Settings → API → Create personal API key

templates.name: Sentry
templates.auth_instructions: Go to Sentry → Settings → Auth Tokens → Create new token

templates.name: PostgreSQL
templates.description: Query databases, browse schemas, and manage tables
templates.auth_instructions: Deploy the PostgreSQL MCP server with your connection string

templates.name: MySQL
templates.description: Query databases, browse schemas, and manage tables
templates.auth_instructions: Deploy the MySQL MCP server with your connection string

templates.name: Redis
templates.description: Key-value operations, pub/sub, and data inspection
templates.auth_instructions: Deploy the Redis MCP server pointing to your Redis instance

templates.name: MongoDB
templates.description: Document operations, aggregation, and collection management
templates.auth_instructions: Deploy the MongoDB MCP server with your connection URI

templates.name: Slack
templates.description: Send messages, manage channels, and search workspace
templates.auth_instructions: Go to Slack → Apps → Create App → OAuth & Permissions → Install to workspace → Copy bot token

templates.name: Discord
templates.description: Send messages, manage channels, and moderate servers
templates.auth_instructions: Go to Discord Developer Portal → Applications → Bot → Copy token

templates.name: AWS
templates.description: Manage S3 buckets, Lambda functions, EC2 instances, and more
templates.auth_instructions: Configure with AWS Access Key ID and Secret Access Key

templates.name: Cloudflare
templates.description: Manage DNS records, Workers, and edge configuration
templates.auth_instructions: Go to Cloudflare → My Profile → API Tokens → Create Token

templates.name: Filesystem
templates.description: Read and write local files, browse directories
templates.auth_instructions: Deploy locally — grants access to the configured directory

templates.name: Web Search
templates.description: Search the web and fetch page content
templates.auth_instructions: Requires a search API key (Google, Bing, or Brave)

templates.name: Puppeteer
templates.description: Browser automation — navigate, screenshot, and extract data
templates.auth_instructions: Deploy the Puppeteer MCP server with a headless Chrome instance
